form:Form.name: ReciboSueldo

qry:select.name: PER_INI
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION JOIN LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion INNER LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion WHERE LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@periodo} AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_tipo_liq != 6 ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PER_INI
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION JOIN LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion INNER LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion WHERE LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:@liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW
